strings.ACHIEVEMENT_LOGCOLLECTOR_DESCRIPTION: Colligere 10 Monstrum seu Opera Acta publica omnia.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_CARRYLUNARITEMS_DESCRIPTION: Portare 5 Lunae items in uno run.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_CHARGETELEPORTERWHILENEARDEA: Ianuae cum minore quam 10% salute praecipe.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_COMPLETEMULTIBOSSSHRINE_DESC: Vincere umbilici Ianuae post activum 2 Sacella montis.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_COMPLETETHREESTAGES_DESCRIPT: Extende et perficite 3 eventus Ianuae sine morte.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_COMPLETE20STAGES_DESCRIPTION: Perficere XX gradus in uno cursu.

strings.ACHIEVEMENT_FINDTIMEDCHEST_DESCRIPTION: Aperi in arca opportuno Securitatis Rallypoint Delta.

strings.ACHIEVEMENT_KILLELEMENTALLEMURIANS_DESCR: Conclave absconditum in Aqueducto relictum detege.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_FINDUNIQUENEWTSTATUES_DESCRI: Inventite et excitant 8 unique Newt altaria.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_FAILSHRINECHANCE_DESCRIPTION: Deficient Sacrarium Fors 3 temporibus in ordine.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_REPEATEDLYDUPLICATEITEMS_DES: Duplicare item eadem 7 tempora in ordine cum 3D Printer.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_COMPLETETHREESTAGESWITHOUTHE: Sine sanatione, perfer et comple 3. Ianuarius eventus.

strings.ACHIEVEMENT_COMMANDOKILLOVERLOADINGWORM_: Ut Commando, vermem obruunt terram occisio ictu.

strings.ACHIEVEMENT_MERCCOMPLETETRIALWITHFULLHEA: Sicut mercenarius, periculum Prismaticum perficiet sine casu 100 infra sanitatem.

strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ENGIARMY_DESCRIPTION: Ut ipsum, XII satellites uno tempore conscribere.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_TREEBOTLOWHEALTHTELEPORTER_D: Sicut REX, eventum teleportorum integrum complet dum sub 50% sanitate.

strings.ACHIEVEMENT_TREEBOTDUNKCLAYBOSS_DESCRIPT: REX, Clay Dunestrider in Aqueducto relictus, eum in foveam coniectis, interficit.

strings.ACHIEVEMENT_LOADERBIGSLAM_DESCRIPTION: Ut Loader, land in Gauntlet hit at 300mph or higher.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_CLEANUPDUTY_DESCRIPTION: Saxa volantes 20 Solvite in Divo Meadow.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_NEVERBACKDOWN_DESCRIPTION: In 4 stadiis continuis radii teleporti non exeunt donec plene oneratur.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_COMMANDOFASTFIRSTSTAGECLEAR_: Sicut Commando, plene primum teleportarium incurrere ante timor V minuta pervenit.

strings.ACHIEVEMENT_CAPTAINSUPPLYDROPFINALE_DESC: Pro capitaneo, occide bulla ultima utens Supple Beacon.
